description: You are using Aerobridge, an open-source drone/UAV fleet management system. Create a new flight plan in the system at http://localhost:8000/admin/ (Username: 'admin', Password: 'adminpass123'). The flight plan must be named 'Mumbai Coastal Survey' with the Plan file json set to {"name": "Mumbai Coastal Survey"} and the Geo json set to {"type": "Point", "coordinates": [72.8777, 19.0760]}. Ensure you remain logged in after the flight plan is created.
